The '''{{ill|Engishiki|ja|延喜式}} funding categories''' refer to the classifications recorded in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳}} indicating the source and scale of offerings (''heihaku'') granted to shrines listed in the register.

{{stub}}
{{wikidata link|Q135009120}}[[Category:Engishiki funding categories]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
[[Category:Translated pages]]
